idea.title: Anti-Ant Colony
idea.hook: You're the QUEEN of a dying colony — sacrifice workers to seal the cracks an enemy colony is digging into YOUR walls.
idea.prototype: Side-view 2-colony cross-section. Enemy ants tunnel toward your queen on autopilot. You spend your own ant-pool: assign each worker to plug a tunnel (worker dies), or breed (slow). Plugs decay over turns. Budget = ants. Win: outlast 12 enemy waves. Distinct from tower defense — you sacrifice units, not place them.
idea.mutation_of: Yandex 'Муравьи против муравейников' + 'Колония муравьев' inverted into the defender's POV. Trending CIS theme, untaken angle.
idea.why_novel: Colony games all let you GROW. None force you to convert your colony INTO the wall — workers become bricks.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Ant pool (limited workers, no resurrection); plug decay forces re-investment.
idea.lose_condition: Any enemy ant reaches the queen chamber (queen_breach >= 1 → gs='GAMEOVER').

sources.title: Муравьи против муравейников
sources.snippet: Yandex CIS-trending ant-vs-ant title used as the inversion anchor. We flipped the POV: instead of attacking the enemy ant hill, you ARE the defender colony being attacked.

sources.title: Колония муравьёв
sources.snippet: Russian colony-builder genre signal. Colony games on Yandex all reward growth; Anti-Ant Colony inverts that by making growth cost workers and forcing sacrifice.

sources.title: Age of Heroes (TD reference)
sources.snippet: danger_combat CTR archetype reference. Borrowed the aggressive close-up impact framing for the cover composition — saturated foreground threat close to the player.

sources.title: Anti-Ant Colony — total_score 70.3, verdict build_now
sources.snippet: Ranked as today's market_anchor slot replacement after Tank Truck Vacuum deduped against 80_shit_truck. CTR score 70, execution 92, novelty 77, category_family strategy_td.

synthesizer_brief: Strategy/TD prototype with inverted defender POV. Vanilla JS side-view cross-section, 12-wave round-based win condition, ant-pool budget + plug decay as non-timer pressure. CTR archetype danger_combat: cover shows the sacrifice moment — amber worker dying in a crack against a glowing red enemy tunnel breach.

alternatives.title: Tank Truck Vacuum
alternatives.hook: Vacuum tank truck sucking up street trash on a timer.

alternatives.title: Gerrymander Ice
alternatives.hook: Re-skin of 79_gerrymander on a frozen voter map.
alternatives.why_novel: Mechanic already shipped — would be iteration, not new build.

alternatives.title: Agent Budget Triage
alternatives.hook: Triage which agent tasks to spend tokens on under a budget cap.
alternatives.why_novel: Inside-baseball theme, narrower CTR appeal than ant colony.

alternatives.title: Bins of Holding
alternatives.hook: Sort items into magic bins that compress space — every wrong sort steals capacity.
alternatives.why_novel: Strong mobile transfer (82.5) but CTR score only 52 — weaker thumb than ants.

alternatives.title: Shader Chip Loadout
alternatives.hook: Drag shader chips onto a GPU board to outscore enemies — chip combos overheat.
alternatives.why_novel: Niche; CIS audience less familiar with shader concept than ant colonies.

alternatives.title: Daily Holmes Mirror
alternatives.hook: Daily detective puzzle where the suspect mirrors your last answer.
alternatives.why_novel: Daily ritual hook good, but text-heavy and harder to render at thumbnail.
